title: leading-harness-implementation
request: Implement the approved Leading Harness Hardening and Runtime Orchestration plan.

requiredOutputs.name: maturity evidence
requiredOutputs.evidence: Audit v2, manifest v2, coverage gate, package smokes, SBOMs, and browser QA.

requiredOutputs.name: doc updates
requiredOutputs.evidence: Root and installed-template living docs updated.

requiredOutputs.name: upgrade evidence when applicable
requiredOutputs.evidence: UPGRADE.md and hash-aware manifest v2 update tests.

requiredOutputs.name: release or rollback notes
requiredOutputs.evidence: PUBLISH.md, DEPLOYMENT.md, SUPPLY_CHAIN.md, and two-package release workflow.
